burst.msg_body: Sequential read of length 4 has been inferred
burst.ParentFunc: rv32_vector_step(ap_uint<32>, ap_uint<32>, ap_uint<32>*, ap_uint<32>*, ap_uint<32>*, ap_uint<1>&)

burst.msg_body: Sequential write of length 4 has been inferred
burst.ParentFunc: rv32_vector_step(ap_uint<32>, ap_uint<32>, ap_uint<32>*, ap_uint<32>*, ap_uint<32>*, ap_uint<1>&)

burst.msg_body: Could not widen since type i32 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0
burst.ParentFunc: rv32_vector_step(ap_uint<32>, ap_uint<32>, ap_uint<32>*, ap_uint<32>*, ap_uint<32>*, ap_uint<1>&)

burst.msg_body: Could not widen since type i32 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0
burst.ParentFunc: rv32_vector_step(ap_uint<32>, ap_uint<32>, ap_uint<32>*, ap_uint<32>*, ap_uint<32>*, ap_uint<1>&)

burst.msg_body: Multiple burst reads of length 4 and bit width 32 has been inferred on bundle 'gmem'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst writes of length 4 and bit width 32 has been inferred on bundle 'gmem'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
